---
title: "Services"
description: "Expertise in Marketing Analytics, Data Engineering, A/B Testing and Machine Learning"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

::: hero-banner
# Data Science & Marketing Analytics Services

## Tailored solutions to turn your data into competitive advantage

From exploratory analysis to production model deployment, I support you at every step of your data journey.

[View my work](/portfolio/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg} [Contact me](mailto:contact-quarto-site.le77r@simplelogin.com){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::

## What I Can Bring You

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-6

### Marketing Analytics

**Optimize your marketing investments with reliable data**

- **Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM)**: Measure the real impact of each channel on sales and optimize budget allocation
- **Multi-touch Attribution**: Understand the complete customer journey and value each touchpoint
- **Campaign Analysis**: Evaluate campaign performance with actionable KPIs (ROAS, CPA, LTV)
- **Customer Segmentation**: Identify your most profitable segments to personalize actions

**Technologies**: R (Robyn, Prophet), Python, BigQuery, Looker Studio

[See MMM project →](/portfolio/analysis/mmm-robyn.qmd)

:::

::: g-col-md-6

### Data Engineering

**Build a modern and scalable data infrastructure**

- **ETL/ELT Pipelines**: Automate data extraction, transformation, and loading
- **Data Warehousing**: Design optimized cloud architectures (BigQuery, Snowflake)
- **dbt Transformation**: Implement versioned, tested, and documented transformations
- **Streaming Analytics**: Process real-time data with Kafka and Spark

**Technologies**: dbt, BigQuery, Airflow, Kafka, Spark, Delta Lake, Docker

[See Pipeline project →](/portfolio/analysis/marketing-pipeline.qmd)

:::
::::::

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-6

### Experimentation & A/B Testing

**Make decisions based on evidence, not intuition**

- **Experiment Design**: Create statistically robust tests with appropriate power calculations
- **Bayesian Analysis**: Get interpretable results with credible intervals
- **Causal Inference**: Go beyond correlation to measure real impact of your actions
- **Heterogeneous Effects (CATE)**: Identify segments that respond best to your interventions

**Technologies**: PyMC, CausalML, DoWhy, statsmodels, ArviZ

[See Causal Inference project →](/portfolio/ml/causal-inference.qmd)

:::

::: g-col-md-6

### Applied Machine Learning

**Deploy models that create business value**

- **Predictive Models**: Anticipate churn, demand, sales with interpretable models
- **Dynamic Pricing**: Optimize prices in real-time based on context and demand
- **Recommendation**: Personalize customer experience with recommendation systems
- **MLOps**: Deploy and monitor production models (Vetiver, FastAPI, Docker)

**Technologies**: scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, Vetiver, FastAPI, MLflow

[See Dynamic Pricing project →](/portfolio/ml/dynamic-pricing.qmd)

:::
::::::

---

## How I Work

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-4

### 1. Discovery

Together we define your business objectives, identify available data and technical constraints. I propose an approach adapted to your context.

:::

::: g-col-md-4

### 2. Development

I develop the solution iteratively, with regular checkpoints to validate direction. You have complete visibility on progress.

:::

::: g-col-md-4

### 3. Delivery

I deliver a documented, tested, and ready-to-use solution. I support you in getting started and remain available for support.

:::
::::::

---

## Technical Stack

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-3

**Languages**

- Python
- R
- SQL

:::

::: g-col-md-3

**Data Engineering**

- dbt
- BigQuery
- Kafka
- Spark
- Airflow

:::

::: g-col-md-3

**Machine Learning**

- scikit-learn
- PyMC
- XGBoost
- CausalML
- Robyn

:::

::: g-col-md-3

**Visualization & Deploy**

- Streamlit
- Shiny
- Plotly
- Docker
- FastAPI

:::
::::::

---

::: contact-section
## Let's Discuss Your Project

Every project is unique. Contact me to discuss your needs and see how I can help you achieve your goals.

[Contact me](mailto:contact-quarto-site.le77r@simplelogin.com){.btn .btn-primary} [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/arnaud-raulet-13308310/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
